title: Canonical Literature Publication Status Policy
scope: Canonical publication-status overlay for audited literature routes.

statusVocabulary.partial-reviewed: A bounded reviewed extract is available; the complete work is not claimed.
statusVocabulary.source-register: Bibliographic, structural or authorship information is available without verified complete verse text.
statusVocabulary.navigation: The page is a route or section navigator rather than a complete reading edition.

records.contentScope: Opening protection verse and verse 1 only.
records.evidenceMarker: only the opening protection verse and verse 1

records.contentScope: Literary identity register; complete verse edition awaits a verified primary text.
records.evidenceMarker: A complete verse edition awaits a verified primary text

records.contentScope: Linked-verse form register; verse text awaits verification.
records.evidenceMarker: will be published only after the original text is verified

records.contentScope: Authorship and poetic-form register; no complete verified text is claimed.
records.evidenceMarker: registered separately under Kumara Gurupara Swamigal

records.contentScope: Work and traditional structure register; complete text withheld pending a redistribution-safe source.
records.evidenceMarker: The complete text is not published

records.contentScope: Source and structure register; unverified complete text is not published.
records.evidenceMarker: without publishing an unverified complete text

records.contentScope: Companion work register without unverified verse text.
records.evidenceMarker: registered without publishing unverified verse text

records.contentScope: Six-section navigator; the page does not reproduce a complete critical text.

limitations: Only eight evidence-backed literature routes are reconciled.
The historical route registry remains a historical snapshot.
